title: Office Hours Web Lab
instructions: Repair the office-hours sign-up page so the HTML output, visual treatment, and confirmation behavior all match the assignment brief before you finalize.
scenario: This models a Dr. Chuck-style web assignment: learners revise a small office-hours page, Lantern grades the result in the browser, and anonymous evidence can return through Lantern's governed submission path.

targets.heading: Office Hours Sign-Up
targets.image_alt: Students reviewing notes before office hours.
targets.success_message: Your office hours request is ready to send.

html_requirements.label: Use one clear page heading that matches the assignment title.
Add descriptive alt text for the hero image.

css_requirements.label: Choose the harbor theme so the call to action uses the approved palette.
Use the comfortable spacing preset so the card breathes on mobile.

js_requirements.label: Set the button text to the approved call to action.
Show the approved confirmation message when the preview button is clicked.
